creator: bacon@uwm.edu
text:
Please revert science/minc2 to the previous port using version 2.0.18,
which is the latest stable release.  Work on the port to make it build
with clang revealed that minc 2.2.0 is not a stable release and the
source code is full of bugs.  It was an error on my part to approve the
the update.

Thanks.
